title: Beautiful Matilda up for adoption at the SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA has many adorable dogs, cats, puppies and kittens eagerly waiting for their forever homes.


> Matilda is about a year old and has already stolen the hearts of everyone who meets her.


She’s beautifully socialised, well-behaved, and has a gentle, loving nature that makes her the perfect companion.

Big enough to count but small enough to manage, Matilda is that ideal mix of grace and personality - a truly perfect lady.This intelligent, pretty girl has had plenty of interest, but no one has yet taken the step to make her part of their family. She’s ready to give all her love to someone who will cherish her in return. If you’re looking for a loyal, affectionate, and easygoing companion, Matilda is waiting for you at the SPCA.Visit the SPCA to meet her in person - you’ll see why everyone falls in love the moment they meet her.

Come and meet these furry friends in Ossie Urban Road, Tamsui Industria, and find your perfect match.

For more information or to adopt, phone 044 878 1990.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
